channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Orthodox Jews oppose new daylight saving bill in Congress
item.description: Orthodox Jewish groups argue the bill would push morning prayers past 9 a.m. in some regions, disrupting religious practices.

item.title: Probe examines if White House teleprompter operator profited from Trump's remarks
item.description: This is the first known investigation into suspected insider trading on a prediction market from within the White House.

item.title: Zelenskyy dismisses Ukraine's tech-focused defense minister in cabinet reshuffle
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy removed the popular defense minister, who had championed battlefield innovation through technology.

item.title: Trump administration proposes permanent fence around Lafayette Park near White House
item.description: The Trump administration plans to install permanent fencing around Lafayette Park, a historic site for protests near the White House.
